title: Senior Doctor - Zydus Lifesciences - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Zydus Lifesciences - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
